main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'daño mecanico en juntas... golpe de ariete' - es una de 3 hipotesis pero no principal

key_signals.justification: C2: 7 signals (18h, borboteo, balance 92%, dP bajos, cond 510->380, P alta)

alternatives.justification: C3: 3 alts (aire residual transitorio, O-ring, contaminacion) bien descartadas

recommended_action.justification: C4: venteo + ramp lento + probe test si rechazo no recupera, sin CIP - matches gold

requested_data.justification: C5: 3 anchors (probe por tubo, antiincrustante, cloro libre)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: probe test uniforme + cond<150 tras venteo -> aire transitorio

reviewer_notes: Claude conflict; diagnostico mecanico prematuro pero action correcta
